note: Illustrative dated corpus for the consensus proxy (gear C). In production this is built from EDGAR filings / news over time; here it is a small hand-authored sample.

documents.text: AI compute demand accelerates as accelerator shipments ramp across hyperscalers.
Datacenter buildout continues; capex rising across cloud providers.
Training clusters scale further; compute density and interconnect bandwidth increase.
HBM supply tightness noted for high bandwidth memory in AI accelerators.
HBM shortage deepens and high bandwidth memory pricing climbs; advanced packaging (CoWoS) capacity also cited as tight.
HBM remains the gating item and memory bandwidth constraints dominate; CoWoS advanced packaging expansions announced.
HBM capacity is central to accelerator roadmaps; memory bandwidth scaling stays in focus.
HBM continues to dominate the supply discussion for high bandwidth memory.
